ddls:
CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run the log belongs to */,
  "step" INTEGER /* Step number in the run */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the log entry */,
  "message" TEXT /* Detailed message of the log entry */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the log entry (e.g., DeprecationWarning, UserWarning) */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Filename where the log entry was generated */,
  "lineno" INTEGER /* Line number in the file where the log entry was generated */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log entry was created */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the log entry belongs to */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment the log entry was generated in */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the log entry */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the log entry (e.g., Info, Warning, Error) */,
  "source_system" TEXT /* Source system or component that generated the log */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the log issue has been resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the log issue */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date when the log issue was resolved */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the log was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager of the project */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the environment belongs to */,
  "environment_type" TEXT /* Type of the environment (e.g., Dev, Test, Prod) */,
  "server_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the server where the environment is hosted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Default severity level of the category (e.g., Info, Warning, Error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, tester, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the log entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the log entry */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the log entry was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the log entry was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES logs ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each run */,
  "run_name" TEXT /* Name of the run */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the run */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the run */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the run */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the run belongs to */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment the run was executed in */,
  "run_status" TEXT /* Current status of the run (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "run_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the run in seconds */,
  "triggered_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the log entry the issue was derived from */,
  "issue_title" TEXT /* Title of the issue */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the issue (e.g., open, in progress, closed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the issue */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user the issue is assigned to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was created */,
  "closed_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was closed */,
  "priority_level" TEXT /* Priority level of the issue (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "resolution_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to resolve the issue in seconds */,
  "root_cause" TEXT /* Root cause of the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES logs ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the comment is made on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., active, deleted) */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_configurations" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert configuration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the alert is configured for */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment the alert is configured for */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the alert is configured for */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for triggering the alert (e.g., number of log entries) */,
  "email_recipients" TEXT /* Email addresses of the recipients */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Whether the alert is active or not */,
  "last_triggered_date" TEXT /* Last date the alert was triggered */,
  "last_triggered_time" TEXT /* Last time the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message that will be sent when the alert is triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_configurations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_configurations_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_configurations_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the report was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., log analysis, issue summary) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the report generation (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_data" (
  "report_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report data entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the data belongs to */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the log entry included in the report */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue included in the report */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of the data (e.g., log entry, issue) */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the data (e.g., log message, issue title) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., log entry, issue) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES logs ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)
